Label Value: Actual system proven in operational environment
Description: System proven through successful mission operations.
Scientific principles underlying the technology are identified and reported. No practical application yet; research is at the conceptual stage.
Analytical and experimental critical function and/or characteristic proof-of-concept demonstrated in a laboratory environment.
System completed and “flight qualified” through test and demonstration in its operational environment.

Label Value: System prototype demonstrated in operational environment
Description: Model or prototype demonstration of the element performance in an operational environment.
The technology concept and potential application are formulated. Performance requirements are broadly defined but consistent with the concept.
Model or prototype demonstration of critical functions in a relevant environment.
Component and/or breadboard validation in a laboratory environment. Demonstrates that the technology works under controlled conditions.
Component and/or breadboard critical function verification in a relevant environment (simulated operational conditions).
